name: Oriental Curry Veggies
recipeIngredient: Daikon, peeled and cut into coins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all vegetables in a mixing bowl.
2. Stir in the pecans.
3. Gradually mix in the dressing ingredients: 1 cup Lowfat mayonnaise, 1/4 cup Plain lowfat yogurt, 1 tbsp Curry powder, 1/4 tsp Garlic powder, 2 tsp Sugar, and 1 tbsp Lemon juice.
4. Place the dish in a roasting pan.
5. Add hot water to the pan so it comes halfway up.
6. Arrange sliced apples in a 9-inch pie plate.
7. Combine sugar, cornstarch, and powdered sugar in a small bowl.
8. Stir in nuts.
9. Bake at 350 degrees F for 35 to 40 minutes or until done.
10. Melt the remaining margarine.
11. Toss lightly with fish sauces if desired.
12. Good for baked goods, cheese toppings, or adding meat and covering with mozzarella/parmesan. Grill over medium, indirect heat about 30 to 35 minutes or until chicken is cooked through.
